ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "cycle" INTEGER /* Cycle number of the trip */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time the trip departed */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time the trip arrived */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "wait_time" REAL /* Wait time for the trip in minutes */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of transportation (1 for autonomous bike, 2 for car) */,
  "origin_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the origin */,
  "origin_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the origin */,
  "destination_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "destination_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the destination */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in meters */,
  "served" INTEGER /* Indicator if the trip was served (true/false) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the trip */,
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who dispatched the trip */,
  "estimated_wait_time" REAL /* Estimated wait time before the trip started */,
  "actual_wait_time" REAL /* Actual wait time before the trip started */,
  "estimated_duration" REAL /* Estimated duration of the trip */,
  "estimated_distance" REAL /* Estimated distance of the trip */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for trip cancellation */,
  "cancellation_time" TEXT /* Time the trip was canceled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_mode FOREIGN KEY ("mode") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_mode FOREIGN KEY ("mode") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_dispatcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("dispatcher_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "autonomous_bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each autonomous bicycle */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Battery life of the bike in minutes */,
  "pickup_speed" REAL /* Pickup speed of the bike */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicator if the bike is available */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Last service date of the bike */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Next service date of the bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the bike was manufactured */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Maintenance notes for the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the car */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicator if the car is available */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Last service date of the car */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Next service date of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the car was manufactured */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the car */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Maintenance notes for the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the agent logged in */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicator if the agent is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle (either bike or car) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the availability record */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicator if the vehicle is available at that time */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (bike or car) */,
  "location_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "location_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the vehicle (for electric vehicles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_availability_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_availability_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the operation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the operation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., maintenance, service) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the operation */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the operation */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who performed the operation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_operations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_operations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_operations_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., passenger, dispatcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_trip_time" TEXT /* Last time the user took a trip */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time the request was made */,
  "origin_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the origin */,
  "origin_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the origin */,
  "destination_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "destination_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the destination */,
  "estimated_pickup_time" TEXT /* Estimated pickup time for the request */,
  "actual_pickup_time" TEXT /* Actual pickup time for the request */,
  "estimated_dropoff_time" TEXT /* Estimated dropoff time for the request */,
  "actual_dropoff_time" TEXT /* Actual dropoff time for the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip assignment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the trip */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Time the assignment was made */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time of the trip */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the trip */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the trip */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the trip */,
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who dispatched the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_assignments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_assignments_dispatcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("dispatcher_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the trip (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time it took for the feedback to be submitted */,
  "submitted_time" TEXT /* Time the feedback was submitted */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the feedback (e.g., technical, service, safety) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the simulation */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the simulation */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario (e.g., traditional, autonomous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scenario */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expense */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., maintenance, fuel, insurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_expenses_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_expenses_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id")
)
